generated_oml:
instance AECOBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building used in Living Lab case study for unified digital twin representation"
    base:contains IndoorTemperatureSensor, IndoorHumiditySensor, LightLevelSensor, CO2Sensor, LightingController, HVACController, WindowBlindsController
]

instance IndoorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor for indoor temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorTemperatureSensor
]

instance IndoorTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream from indoor environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance IndoorHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor for indoor humidity monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorHumiditySensor
]

instance IndoorHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data stream from indoor environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring light levels in adaptive lighting systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level data for visual comfort adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for monitoring carbon dioxide levels for health effects"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 concentration data for non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for adjusting lighting systems to optimize visual comfort"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for HVAC system operations to manage thermal comfort and energy use"
]

instance WindowBlindsController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for window blinds to regulate natural light and thermal conditions"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and device state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService, SimulationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodologies for automated BIM to digital twin transformation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with Building Control System components and sensor/actuator metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE
]

instance SensorMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata for environmental sensors used in BCS"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE
]

instance ActuatorMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata for actuators and controllers in BCS"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE
]

instance MiddlewareConfigurations : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building environmental conditions and system performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario testing and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating predictive analytics on energy, visual comfort, and health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for executing energy consumption optimization actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for adjusting visual comfort through lighting and blinds control"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsBalancingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for balancing non-visual health effects via environmental adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectsAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building data using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous stream of real-time environmental data for building monitoring"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted outcomes of operational scenarios through simulation"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted energy usage patterns for optimization opportunities"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted visual comfort levels based on lighting and environmental data"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of indoor environmental factors affecting occupant health"
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visual representation of building systems for facility management"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC and lighting systems to optimize energy use"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting and window blinds for optimal visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustments to air quality, temperature, and lighting to balance non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin and fed back to Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time operational adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and digital counterparts, with continuous data exchange for live operational updates and immediate response to physical system changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented framework integrating BIM as the semantic backbone, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, and Unreal Engine for visualization, with standardized extension points for scalable service integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle, including design, construction, operations, refurbishments, and adaptations during operation, with BIM serving as a semantic backbone for lifecycle-encompassing optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability, architectural soundness, and alignment between digital and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware facilitate real-time data exchange between physical assets and the Digital Twin, enabling bidirectional communication without specific protocol details mentioned in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points and middleware (Eclipse Hono and Ditto) enable interoperability with external systems as part of the modular, service-oriented architecture."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and standardized extension points for modular service integration within the AECO domain, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]
